splitTemplates.name: Hybrid Performance Split (Spring 2026)
splitTemplates.description: Consolidated stress: sprints and lower body lifts occur on the same day. High intent, low volume. One primary strength movement per day. Functional staples matter, including Zercher Bulgarian Split Squats and Deadlift Rows. Optional post-lift Zone 2 Incline Treadmill Walk can be used as a finisher.

Monday.name: Posterior Biased Leg Day (DPE-D)
Monday.summary:
Posterior Biased Leg Day (DPE-D)
- Deadlift: 3x5
- Barbell Row: 3x8
- Pull-Up: 3xAMRAP
- Farmer's Carries: 3x30m
- RDL: 3x10
- Hamstring Curls: 3x12

splitTemplates.name: PPLRPPL
splitTemplates.description: Classic 6-day Push/Pull/Legs rotation with one rest day. Each movement pattern is trained twice weekly.

Monday.name: Push A
Monday.summary:
Push A
- Flat Bench Press: 4x6-8
- Seated Barbell Press: 3x8-10
- Incline DB Bench Press: 3x10
- DB Lateral Raises: 3x12-15
- Cable Tricep Pushdowns: 3x12
- Skullcrushers: 3x10

splitTemplates.name: 5-Day Bro Split
splitTemplates.description: Classic 5-day body-part split with two rest days. High session volume, lower weekly frequency.

Monday.name: Chest
Monday.summary:
Chest Day
- Flat Bench Press: 4x6-8
- Incline Barbell Bench Press: 3x8-10
- Incline DB Bench Press: 3x10
- Machine Chest Press: 3x12
- Chest Fly: 3x12-15
- Dips: 3xAMRAP

- Pull-Up: 3xAMRAP
